creator: nick@kirby.cx
text:
I've asked Zsolt to commit what we have right now as the only outstanding work is to port py-tavern so all of the pytest script works.

Py-test requires a bit more dependency work before I can make it, so there will be a delay on that, and prior to this there was no test implementation at all so it won't be a step back in any way :)

Certainly not worth leaving the port unusable IMO.

Otherwise I've been using 4.3.2 since it was released and the only error I've seen is when I try to log in with the wrong password ;)
